calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On The Sale Of The Items Of Tangible Personal Property, Balance Of Costs Re Postage, And The Filing Of The Receipt Of Distribution Of The Remaining Items To Ruth Seckinger.
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following cases were called and heard together:
1) PCN-15-299267, Conservatorship of Anita Seckinger; and
2) PTR-17-300891, The Anita Seckinger 2017 Living Trust

Appearances:
Avid Alavi for and with Thomas A. Lucas, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Ms. Alavi provided an update regarding a collection of coins referenced in the petition. She explained that she had left the petition unchanged to allow Ms. Seckinger the opportunity to decide whether she wanted to receive the coins. She reported that she spoke with Ms. Seckinger the previous Friday, and arrangements were made for her to view the coins. If she elected to accept the coins, she would sign a receipt, and the receipt would be filed with the Court. If she declined to take them, the remaining coins would be sold to cover legal fees. Ms. Alavi confirmed that Ms. Seckinger was willing to pay additional legal fees related to the coins.

Ms. Seckinger confirmed that this was accurate and stated that she had no additional comments.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
